query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN summaryEs IS NULL OR summaryEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as docs_no_summary_es,
  SUM(CASE WHEN contentEs IS NULL OR contentEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as docs_no_content_es
FROM documents;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qC6e8XA9uYDpdWY.4aab5d30693d --database DirVLPm6UeFJi3utFGbgZe --execute SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN summaryEs IS NULL OR summaryEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as docs_no_summary_es,
  SUM(CASE WHEN contentEs IS NULL OR contentEs = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as docs_no_content_es
FROM documents;
